title: Rolson 43121 Bike Cover
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Complete with quick release plastic buckle
description: From the manufacturer About Us Rolson Tools continually look to bring them innovative products, all at the possible margins and this year is no different. To date, they have over 250 exciting and innovative products to whet their appetite, together with a host of new in store packaging and point of sale material. All designed with impact and shelf appeal. The Rolson marketing team have sought innovative ways to their existing lines. They bring product combinations that bring originality. Rolson 43121 Bike Cover It is suitable for most bikes, motorbikes and scooter. It protects against rain, dust and general debris. It is complete with quick release plastic buckle for securing around their bike. Supplied folded in a bag.
